---
title: Macrofinance
author: Hirotaka Fukui
date: 2025/8/26
format: html
lang: ja
code-fold: true
engine: julia
---

## Macrofinanceとは
```{julia}
#| label: fig-parametric
#| fig-cap: "Parametric Plots"

using Plots

plot(sin, 
     x->sin(2x), 
     0, 
     2π, 
     leg=false, 
     fill=(0,:lavender))
```
